private.msg: Only accessible to the class / module / file where it is declared.

protected.msg: Only accessible to children and the class itself.

extern.msg: Means: will be defined in another file.

@peek.msg: On private or protected member, can be read / referenced from anywhere.

@cfunc.msg: C function from an external library.

constexpr.msg: Define a compile-time int / float constant.

if.msg: Execute code only if a condition is true.

elif.msg: Short for `else if`. If precedent conditions are false, run code if a condition is true.

else.msg: If all precedent conditions are false, execute code.

while.msg: Repeat code while the condition is true.

for.msg: Repeat code while the condition is true. Runs `init` at the start of the loop and `step` after every repeat.

switch.msg: Check for possible values of an int / object.

case.msg: Inside a switch, check for a value / condition.

default.msg: Inside a switch, runs if all cases failed.

continue.msg: Skip current repeat of the loop and go to the next one.

@next.msg: Go to next `else if` statement or next `case` statement.

@end.msg: Go to the end of the `if-else` chain or the `switch` statement.

return.msg: End a function and optionally return a value.

@asm.msg: Inline assembly. Temporaries (general purpose registers) available from @0 to @9.

variant.msg: Creates a union type with an extra `type` member holding the currently used member in the union.

class.msg: Creates a class type. All members must be defined together and before any function is <u>defined</u>. Any number of `class` blocks can be used to define a class.

module.msg: Create a global module. Any number of `module` blocks can be used to define a module.

sizeof.msg: Get size of a type / variable in bytes.

typeof.msg: Get type of variable / expression in bytes.
